medium.text: The function g is defined by g(x) = (x + 14)(t − x), where t is a constant. In the xy-plane, the graph of y = g(x) passes through the point (24, 0). What is the value of g(0) ? A right rectangular prism has a height of 9 inches. The length of the prism’s base is x inches, which is 7 inches more than the width of the prism’s base. Which function V gives the volume of the prism, in cubic inches, in terms of the length of the prism’s base?
60. What is the value of x ?
What is the sum of all possible values of w ?
What is 20% of 440?
